THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: PLAINTIFF NEWMARK REALTY CAPITAL, INC. SHALL HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DYER MOUNTAIN ASSOCIATES, LLC THE PRINCIPAL SUM OF $420,000; PLUS INTEREST ON THE PRINCIPAL SUM AT THE RATE OF TEN PERCENT (10%) PER ANNUM FROM OCTOBER 1, 2005, THROUGH THE DATE HEREOF, LESS THE SUM OF $20,000, FOR A TOTAL OF $101,512.61; PLUS COSTS, INCLUDING ATTORNEYS' FEES, INCURRED IN CONNECTION WITH THIS ACTION. JUDGMENT SHALL BE STAYED FOR 90 DAYS FROM THE DATE HEREOF. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS OF THE JUDGMENT
